prompt: Scaffold a webhook receiver that validates the signature and stores the event.
expected:
```aro
(receiveWebhook: Webhooks API) {
    Extract the <signature> from the <request: headers/x-signature>.
    Extract the <payload> from the <request: body>.
    Throw a <Unauthorized: status> with "bad signature" when <signature> == "".
    Store the <payload> into the <webhook-repository>.
    Return an <OK: status> for the <reception>.
}
```
